build.name: Frame Roofing Utah
build.public_side_effect_note: Rows and delivery drafts only. No email, SMS, Google Sheet, portal, GBP, DNS, tracking, review, outreach, or public website action was performed.

batch.title: Frame Roofing Utah customer request pack

requests.title: Confirm public business details
requests.ask: Confirm the exact public business name, phone number, email, address/service-area status, and preferred contact path.
requests.why_needed: These become the site footer, schema, citations, lead paths, and Google-ready business facts.
requests.destination_artifact: site footer / schema / citations / lead paths

requests.title: Confirm services
requests.ask: Mark each service as Yes, No, Maybe, or Later, and add any service you want included.
requests.why_needed: This controls the sitemap, navigation, service copy, schema, and avoids advertising work you do not want.
requests.destination_artifact: sitemap / service pages / copy brief / schema

requests.title: Confirm service areas
requests.ask: Confirm the cities, neighborhoods, and ZIPs you actively serve now, plus any areas you want to grow into later.
requests.why_needed: Service-area pages, local schema, ads, GBP settings, and AEO answers must match real operating areas.
requests.destination_artifact: city pages / local schema / GBP plan / growth roadmap

requests.title: Upload real job photos
requests.ask: Upload 5-10 real job photos, truck/signage photos, crew photos, or before/after sets.
requests.why_needed: Real proof improves trust, conversion, AEO credibility, and Google profile content.
requests.destination_artifact: homepage proof / service pages / case studies / GBP plan

requests.title: Owner story
requests.ask: In 2-4 sentences, tell us why homeowners or property owners choose your company.
requests.why_needed: This becomes the first draft of the About page and trust copy.
requests.example_good_answer: Customers choose us because we explain the issue clearly, document the work with photos, and keep the owner involved from inspection through cleanup.
requests.destination_artifact: about page / homepage trust section / AEO answers

requests.title: Upload owner or team photo
requests.ask: Upload an owner headshot, team photo, or office/truck photo we are allowed to use publicly.
requests.why_needed: A real face makes the About section and trust panels more believable.
requests.destination_artifact: about page / trust section / social proof

requests.title: Approve or remove public claims
requests.ask: Confirm or remove license, warranty, financing, emergency availability, insurance, certification, review-count, and years-in-business claims.
requests.why_needed: Unsupported claims should not be published in website copy, schema, ads, or Google-facing content.
requests.destination_artifact: copy / schema / launch QA / Google profile plan

requests.title: Confirm lead destination
requests.ask: Confirm where form leads, call alerts, quote requests, and appointment requests should go.
requests.why_needed: Lead paths need a real destination before launch or before changing tracking.
requests.example_good_answer: Send form leads to office@example.com and text missed-call alerts to the office manager.
requests.destination_artifact: forms / call tracking / CRM draft / launch QA

requests.title: Share Google access status
requests.ask: Tell us whether you already have Google Business Profile, Search Console, GA4, Tag Manager, Google Ads, or call tracking access. Do not send passwords.
requests.why_needed: Access unlocks measurement, indexing, local visibility, and launch verification.
requests.destination_artifact: GSC / GBP / GA4 / GTM / growth dashboard

requests.title: Share domain, DNS, and hosting access process
requests.ask: Tell us who controls domain/DNS/hosting and the safest way to request access or make launch changes. Do not send passwords.
requests.why_needed: DNS and hosting access are needed for domain launch, redirects, HTTPS, and production verification.

requests.title: Share existing profile links
requests.ask: Share links to Yelp, BBB, Angi, Nextdoor, Facebook, chamber, supplier, manufacturer, insurance, or association profiles if you already have them.
requests.why_needed: These feed citation cleanup, backlink planning, reputation strategy, and local authority maps.
requests.destination_artifact: growth backlog / citation map / backlink matrix

requests.title: Share approved review or testimonial sources
requests.ask: Share links to existing review profiles and tell us which testimonials, if any, you approve for public website use.
requests.why_needed: We can cite real reputation proof only when the source and approval are clear.

delivery_drafts.subject: Frame Roofing Utah: 12 build items to confirm
delivery_drafts.body_markdown:
# Frame Roofing Utah build requests
Channel: portal
## Open items
1. Approve or remove public claims (P0, launch blocker)
   Ask: Confirm or remove license, warranty, financing, emergency availability, insurance, certification, review-count, and years-in-business claims.
   Why: Unsupported claims should not be published in website copy, schema, ads, or Google-facing content.
   Response: approval
   Used for: copy / schema / launch QA / Google profile plan
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:approve-public-claims
2. Confirm lead destination (P1, launch blocker)
   Ask: Confirm where form leads, call alerts, quote requests, and appointment requests should go.
   Why: Lead paths need a real destination before launch or before changing tracking.
   Response: short text
   Example: Send form leads to office@example.com and text missed-call alerts to the office manager.
   Used for: forms / call tracking / CRM draft / launch QA
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:lead-destination
3. Confirm public business details (P1, quality)
   Ask: Confirm the exact public business name, phone number, email, address/service-area status, and preferred contact path.
   Why: These become the site footer, schema, citations, lead paths, and Google-ready business facts.
   Response: confirm correct
   Used for: site footer / schema / citations / lead paths
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:confirm-nap
4. Confirm service areas (P1, quality)
   Ask: Confirm the cities, neighborhoods, and ZIPs you actively serve now, plus any areas you want to grow into later.
   Why: Service-area pages, local schema, ads, GBP settings, and AEO answers must match real operating areas.
   Response: matrix
   Used for: city pages / local schema / GBP plan / growth roadmap
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:confirm-service-areas
5. Confirm services (P1, quality)
   Ask: Mark each service as Yes, No, Maybe, or Later, and add any service you want included.
   Why: This controls the sitemap, navigation, service copy, schema, and avoids advertising work you do not want.
   Response: matrix
   Used for: sitemap / service pages / copy brief / schema
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:confirm-services
6. Owner story (P1, quality)
   Ask: In 2-4 sentences, tell us why homeowners or property owners choose your company.
   Why: This becomes the first draft of the About page and trust copy.
   Response: short text
   Example: Customers choose us because we explain the issue clearly, document the work with photos, and keep the owner involved from inspection through cleanup.
   Used for: about page / homepage trust section / AEO answers
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:owner-about-story
7. Upload owner or team photo (P1, quality)
   Ask: Upload an owner headshot, team photo, or office/truck photo we are allowed to use publicly.
   Why: A real face makes the About section and trust panels more believable.
   Response: file upload
   Used for: about page / trust section / social proof
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:owner-headshot-team-photo
8. Upload real job photos (P1, quality)
   Ask: Upload 5-10 real job photos, truck/signage photos, crew photos, or before/after sets.
   Why: Real proof improves trust, conversion, AEO credibility, and Google profile content.
   Response: file upload
   Used for: homepage proof / service pages / case studies / GBP plan
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:upload-job-photos
9. Share approved review or testimonial sources (P2, quality)
   Ask: Share links to existing review profiles and tell us which testimonials, if any, you approve for public website use.
   Why: We can cite real reputation proof only when the source and approval are clear.
   Response: link
   Used for: review proof / testimonials / reputation plan
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:review-testimonial-approval
10. Share domain, DNS, and hosting access process (P2, growth backlog)
   Ask: Tell us who controls domain/DNS/hosting and the safest way to request access or make launch changes. Do not send passwords.
   Why: DNS and hosting access are needed for domain launch, redirects, HTTPS, and production verification.
   Response: access
   Used for: DNS / hosting / launch checklist / redirects
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:domain-dns-hosting-access
11. Share existing profile links (P2, growth backlog)
   Ask: Share links to Yelp, BBB, Angi, Nextdoor, Facebook, chamber, supplier, manufacturer, insurance, or association profiles if you already have them.
   Why: These feed citation cleanup, backlink planning, reputation strategy, and local authority maps.
   Response: link
   Used for: growth backlog / citation map / backlink matrix
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:existing-profile-links
12. Share Google access status (P2, growth backlog)
   Ask: Tell us whether you already have Google Business Profile, Search Console, GA4, Tag Manager, Google Ads, or call tracking access. Do not send passwords.
   Why: Access unlocks measurement, indexing, local visibility, and launch verification.
   Response: access
   Used for: GSC / GBP / GA4 / GTM / growth dashboard
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:google-access-map
Public-use approvals stay pending until explicitly confirmed.

delivery_drafts.sms_text: Frame Roofing Utah: 12 build items need confirmation, 2 blockers.

sheet_rows.title: Approve or remove public claims
sheet_rows.ask: Confirm or remove license, warranty, financing, emergency availability, insurance, certification, review-count, and years-in-business claims.
sheet_rows.why_needed: Unsupported claims should not be published in website copy, schema, ads, or Google-facing content.
sheet_rows.destination_artifact: copy / schema / launch QA / Google profile plan

sheet_rows.title: Confirm lead destination
sheet_rows.ask: Confirm where form leads, call alerts, quote requests, and appointment requests should go.
sheet_rows.why_needed: Lead paths need a real destination before launch or before changing tracking.
sheet_rows.destination_artifact: forms / call tracking / CRM draft / launch QA

sheet_rows.title: Confirm public business details
sheet_rows.ask: Confirm the exact public business name, phone number, email, address/service-area status, and preferred contact path.
sheet_rows.why_needed: These become the site footer, schema, citations, lead paths, and Google-ready business facts.
sheet_rows.destination_artifact: site footer / schema / citations / lead paths

sheet_rows.title: Confirm service areas
sheet_rows.ask: Confirm the cities, neighborhoods, and ZIPs you actively serve now, plus any areas you want to grow into later.
sheet_rows.why_needed: Service-area pages, local schema, ads, GBP settings, and AEO answers must match real operating areas.
sheet_rows.destination_artifact: city pages / local schema / GBP plan / growth roadmap

sheet_rows.title: Confirm services
sheet_rows.ask: Mark each service as Yes, No, Maybe, or Later, and add any service you want included.
sheet_rows.why_needed: This controls the sitemap, navigation, service copy, schema, and avoids advertising work you do not want.
sheet_rows.destination_artifact: sitemap / service pages / copy brief / schema

sheet_rows.title: Owner story
sheet_rows.ask: In 2-4 sentences, tell us why homeowners or property owners choose your company.
sheet_rows.why_needed: This becomes the first draft of the About page and trust copy.
sheet_rows.destination_artifact: about page / homepage trust section / AEO answers

sheet_rows.title: Upload owner or team photo
sheet_rows.ask: Upload an owner headshot, team photo, or office/truck photo we are allowed to use publicly.
sheet_rows.why_needed: A real face makes the About section and trust panels more believable.
sheet_rows.destination_artifact: about page / trust section / social proof

sheet_rows.title: Upload real job photos
sheet_rows.ask: Upload 5-10 real job photos, truck/signage photos, crew photos, or before/after sets.
sheet_rows.why_needed: Real proof improves trust, conversion, AEO credibility, and Google profile content.
sheet_rows.destination_artifact: homepage proof / service pages / case studies / GBP plan

sheet_rows.title: Share approved review or testimonial sources
sheet_rows.ask: Share links to existing review profiles and tell us which testimonials, if any, you approve for public website use.
sheet_rows.why_needed: We can cite real reputation proof only when the source and approval are clear.
sheet_rows.destination_artifact: review proof / testimonials / reputation plan

sheet_rows.title: Share domain, DNS, and hosting access process
sheet_rows.ask: Tell us who controls domain/DNS/hosting and the safest way to request access or make launch changes. Do not send passwords.
sheet_rows.why_needed: DNS and hosting access are needed for domain launch, redirects, HTTPS, and production verification.
sheet_rows.destination_artifact: DNS / hosting / launch checklist / redirects
sheet_rows.internal_notes: Never request or store passwords in this row.

sheet_rows.title: Share existing profile links
sheet_rows.ask: Share links to Yelp, BBB, Angi, Nextdoor, Facebook, chamber, supplier, manufacturer, insurance, or association profiles if you already have them.
sheet_rows.why_needed: These feed citation cleanup, backlink planning, reputation strategy, and local authority maps.
sheet_rows.destination_artifact: growth backlog / citation map / backlink matrix

sheet_rows.title: Share Google access status
sheet_rows.ask: Tell us whether you already have Google Business Profile, Search Console, GA4, Tag Manager, Google Ads, or call tracking access. Do not send passwords.
sheet_rows.why_needed: Access unlocks measurement, indexing, local visibility, and launch verification.
sheet_rows.destination_artifact: GSC / GBP / GA4 / GTM / growth dashboard
sheet_rows.internal_notes: Never request or store passwords in this row.

delivery_drafts.send_gate: External email, SMS, Google Sheet writes, and app mentions require explicit approval plus configured provider credentials.

delivery_drafts.subject: Frame Roofing Utah: 12 build items to confirm
delivery_drafts.body_markdown:
# Frame Roofing Utah build requests
Channel: google sheet
## Open items
1. Approve or remove public claims (P0, launch blocker)
   Ask: Confirm or remove license, warranty, financing, emergency availability, insurance, certification, review-count, and years-in-business claims.
   Why: Unsupported claims should not be published in website copy, schema, ads, or Google-facing content.
   Response: approval
   Used for: copy / schema / launch QA / Google profile plan
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:approve-public-claims
2. Confirm lead destination (P1, launch blocker)
   Ask: Confirm where form leads, call alerts, quote requests, and appointment requests should go.
   Why: Lead paths need a real destination before launch or before changing tracking.
   Response: short text
   Example: Send form leads to office@example.com and text missed-call alerts to the office manager.
   Used for: forms / call tracking / CRM draft / launch QA
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:lead-destination
3. Confirm public business details (P1, quality)
   Ask: Confirm the exact public business name, phone number, email, address/service-area status, and preferred contact path.
   Why: These become the site footer, schema, citations, lead paths, and Google-ready business facts.
   Response: confirm correct
   Used for: site footer / schema / citations / lead paths
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:confirm-nap
4. Confirm service areas (P1, quality)
   Ask: Confirm the cities, neighborhoods, and ZIPs you actively serve now, plus any areas you want to grow into later.
   Why: Service-area pages, local schema, ads, GBP settings, and AEO answers must match real operating areas.
   Response: matrix
   Used for: city pages / local schema / GBP plan / growth roadmap
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:confirm-service-areas
5. Confirm services (P1, quality)
   Ask: Mark each service as Yes, No, Maybe, or Later, and add any service you want included.
   Why: This controls the sitemap, navigation, service copy, schema, and avoids advertising work you do not want.
   Response: matrix
   Used for: sitemap / service pages / copy brief / schema
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:confirm-services
6. Owner story (P1, quality)
   Ask: In 2-4 sentences, tell us why homeowners or property owners choose your company.
   Why: This becomes the first draft of the About page and trust copy.
   Response: short text
   Example: Customers choose us because we explain the issue clearly, document the work with photos, and keep the owner involved from inspection through cleanup.
   Used for: about page / homepage trust section / AEO answers
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:owner-about-story
7. Upload owner or team photo (P1, quality)
   Ask: Upload an owner headshot, team photo, or office/truck photo we are allowed to use publicly.
   Why: A real face makes the About section and trust panels more believable.
   Response: file upload
   Used for: about page / trust section / social proof
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:owner-headshot-team-photo
8. Upload real job photos (P1, quality)
   Ask: Upload 5-10 real job photos, truck/signage photos, crew photos, or before/after sets.
   Why: Real proof improves trust, conversion, AEO credibility, and Google profile content.
   Response: file upload
   Used for: homepage proof / service pages / case studies / GBP plan
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:upload-job-photos
9. Share approved review or testimonial sources (P2, quality)
   Ask: Share links to existing review profiles and tell us which testimonials, if any, you approve for public website use.
   Why: We can cite real reputation proof only when the source and approval are clear.
   Response: link
   Used for: review proof / testimonials / reputation plan
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:review-testimonial-approval
10. Share domain, DNS, and hosting access process (P2, growth backlog)
   Ask: Tell us who controls domain/DNS/hosting and the safest way to request access or make launch changes. Do not send passwords.
   Why: DNS and hosting access are needed for domain launch, redirects, HTTPS, and production verification.
   Response: access
   Used for: DNS / hosting / launch checklist / redirects
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:domain-dns-hosting-access
11. Share existing profile links (P2, growth backlog)
   Ask: Share links to Yelp, BBB, Angi, Nextdoor, Facebook, chamber, supplier, manufacturer, insurance, or association profiles if you already have them.
   Why: These feed citation cleanup, backlink planning, reputation strategy, and local authority maps.
   Response: link
   Used for: growth backlog / citation map / backlink matrix
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:existing-profile-links
12. Share Google access status (P2, growth backlog)
   Ask: Tell us whether you already have Google Business Profile, Search Console, GA4, Tag Manager, Google Ads, or call tracking access. Do not send passwords.
   Why: Access unlocks measurement, indexing, local visibility, and launch verification.
   Response: access
   Used for: GSC / GBP / GA4 / GTM / growth dashboard
   Sync key: frame:frame-roofing-utah:customer_requests:google-access-map
Public-use approvals stay pending until explicitly confirmed.
